pain.who: [Role of the person experiencing the pain]
pain.cost: [Quantified cost: hours/week, dollars/month, error rate, etc.]
pain.task: [The specific task that causes the pain]
pain.root_cause: [Why the current process fails — a structural problem, not a missing feature]

wedge.desperate_audience: [Who has this pain at 10x intensity — a specific person/role, not a demographic]
wedge.one_dimension: [The single axis where this solution is undeniably better]
wedge.saying_no_to: [Users, features, and markets you are explicitly refusing to serve]

current_workaround.bottleneck: [Where most pain concentrates — this is the target]

function.name: [function_name]
function.input: [input_type — be specific about shape and fields]
function.output: [output_type — be specific about shape and fields]
function.description: [One sentence: what transformation does this perform?]

constraints.out_of_scope: [List everything you are NOT building: no UI, no auth, no database, no API, etc.]
constraints.done_condition: [How you will measure success — who uses it, how often, replacing what]

instruction: Build ONLY the function described above. Do not add features, UI, or infrastructure beyond what is specified. Optimize for correctness and usability, not completeness. The build should feel inevitable given the context above.
